title: Canada Transport Sector Quarterly Trend Sheet- Q4 2024
content:
Key Takeaways:

In Q4 2024, zero-emission vehicle (ZEV) adoption continued to accelerate, supported by a general rise in vehicle sales. Battery electric and plug-in hybrid vehicles drove this momentum, while traditional gasoline consumption declined. Ethanol blending saw a modest increase, though renewable diesel and biodiesel usage slightly dropped. Quebec emerged as the national leader in ZEV market share and sales growth, while British Columbia & Territories and the Northwest Territories experienced notable declines. Most provinces saw gains in ZEV sales relative to total vehicle sales.
author: Mansift Kaur
